transcript.content: 这两个问题我已经针对性修了： 1. 点击有时没反应 原因是点击后才同步去跑命令，窗口要等结果回来才出现。 现在改成： - 点击后立刻打开小窗口 - 如果有缓存先显示缓存 - 没缓存就先显示 `Loading…` - 后台再异步刷新内容
`Ctx: error` 的意思很直接： `独立扩展在刷新 context 大小时失败了。`
已经补上了。 现在独立扩展会把这几种情况明确分开：

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/Contents/Frameworks/Code Helper (Plugin).app/Contents/MacOS/Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
根因就是你贴出来的这句： ```text /Applications/Visual Studio Code.app/.../Code Helper (Plugin) scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size ```

# Context Refresh Failed workspace: /Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core Command failed: /usr/local/bin/node scripts/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js --format size Each VS Code window refreshes its own workspace independently.
我已经把这个问题修到根上了。 根因不是 node 路径了，而是状态栏刷新走了完整 GC 判定链路，导致扩展里看起来像“点击没反应 / 刷新失败”。现在我把状态栏和详情窗口改成了 `host-only fast path`：
为什么 codex插件里是 486k，你给的是258k？
因为我这里的监控脚本把窗口上限 `主动 clamp 到了 258k`，而 Codex 插件显示的是它自己上报的 `reported model_context_window`，大约 `486k`。 代码里就是这么写的：

decision.archive_summary: Earlier thread about `Ctx: error` / `Context Refresh Failed` in the VS Code extension appears resolved: assistant explained it as context-size refresh failure, then said it was fixed by separating cases and switching status bar/detail refresh to a host-only fast path instead of the full GC decision path. Current active topic is the later discrepancy between Codex plugin context size (~486k) and the assistant-reported clamped value (~258k).
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user turn continues the active topic from t10-t11, so relation is `continue`. The next turn still depends on the raw discrepancy question and answer in t10-t11, which should remain raw. The older refresh-failure/debugging block t1-t9 is a solved prior topic and is a good eviction candidate. No durable user fact or standing preference in those turns needs pinning.

Current active topic is the later discrepancy between Codex plugin context size (~486k) and the assistant-reported clamped value (~258k).

The older refresh-failure/debugging block t1-t9 is a solved prior topic and is a good eviction candidate. No durable user fact or standing preference in those turns needs pinning.

因为我这里的监控脚本把窗口上限 `主动 clamp 到了 258k`，而 Codex 插件显示的是它自己上报的 `reported model_context_window`，大约 `486k`。 代码里就是这么写的：
